regional_cost_note: Painters in Hamilton typically charge $35–$55/hr. Waikato rates are generally 10–20% below Auckland. A full exterior repaint of a standard home costs $4,000–$10,000.

businesses.name: J L Connolly Painters
businesses.known_for: Hamilton's oldest painting company, founded 1950; Registered Master Painters member since 1969 — over 55 years of continuous membership.

businesses.name: MSPS Painters
businesses.known_for: Backed by a 5-year quality workmanship guarantee; if their work fails within 5 years, they return and fix it at no cost.

businesses.name: First Rate Finish
businesses.known_for: Experienced interior and exterior painters praised for project management; handles standard residential to large commercial.

businesses.name: Fresh Look Painters
businesses.known_for: Family-owned; known for tidy workmanship, affordable pricing, and reliability — they show up when they say they will.

businesses.name: Waikato Painters
businesses.known_for: Local painters covering greater Hamilton and Waikato; interior, exterior, and commercial repaints.
